---
title: "challenge"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
1 + 1
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#| echo: false
2 * 2
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).

---
title: "Challenge"
format: html
---

Data
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(haven)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(countrycode)

library(devtools)

install_github("vdeminstitute/vdemdata")#Maerz, Seraphine F., Amanda B. Edgell, Sebastian Hellemeier, Nina Illchenko, and Linnea Fox. 2025. vdemdata: An R package to load, explore and work with the most recent V-Dem (Varieties of Democracy) dataset. https://github.com/vdeminstitute/vdemdata
library(vdemdata)


micro_data <- read_dta("ZA7575.dta") #surveys paradata

macro_data <- vdem
```

## Data Cleaning
Cleaning. 

```{r}
macro_data <- macro_data |> 
  filter(year == 2019) #only 2019 observations

micro_data$isocntry <- ifelse(
  micro_data$isocntry %in% c("DE-W", "DE-E"),
  "DE",
  micro_data$isocntry
) #merging variable DE to one instead for future analysis

macro_data$iso2 <- countrycode(macro_data$country_text_id,
                               origin = "iso3c",
                               destination = "iso2c")
macro_data_filtered <- macro_data |> 
  filter(iso2 %in% micro_data$isocntry)

#countries in macro level dataset
macro_data_filtered |> 
  summarise(unique_countries = n_distinct(iso2)) #28

#countries in micro level dataset
micro_data |> 
  summarise(unique_countries = n_distinct(isocntry)) #28
```

Only select the relevant variables. 
```{r}
#selected variables
micro_data <- micro_data |> 
  select(qc15_1, d11, sd1_4, sd3, qc1_4, d70, d71_1, d71_2, d71_3, qc2_4, qc5_1, qc7, d1, d7, d10, d8, d15a, d25, d43b, d60, d62_3, d63, d72_1, d72_2, d77, p4, p5, p6, p7, sd2_1, sd2_2, sd2_3, sd2_5, sd2_4)

macro_data_filtered <- macro_data_filtered |> 
  select(iso2, v2pepwrort, e_gdppc, v2x_freexp_altinf, v2xcl_rol, v2cacamps, v2smpolhate, v2peedueq)
```
